divine_helm.description: A radiant helm blessed by the gods. Turns aside blows that would fell any mortal.

divine_platebody.description: Armour forged from celestial metal. Said to be nearly indestructible.

divine_shield.description: A blessed shield that radiates a faint golden light.

tower_helm.description: A helmet carved from the tower's upper floors.

tower_body.description: Impenetrable armour from the tower's inner sanctum.
